name: anamnesis
description: Connect Codex to Anamnesis, a local-first memory bridge for existing agent and memory-framework data.

interface.longDescription: Anamnesis lets Codex query memories imported from existing agents and memory frameworks such as Claude Code, Codex, mem0, Letta, Hermes, OpenClaw, TDAI, OpenViking, MemPalace, Memori, MemOS, Memary, and generic MCP resource servers.
defaultPrompt: Search Anamnesis for relevant project memory
